content.text:
目前你只配置了 `origin`（你自己的 fork），还没有设置 `upstream` 来指向原始仓库。

如果想同步原始仓库的更新，需要添加上游 remote：

```bash
git remote add upstream https://github.com/原仓库地址/mini-coding-agent.git
```

然后可以用 `git fetch upstream` 拉取上游更新，再用 `git merge upstream/main` 合并。

1   2 # Mini-Coding-Agent 3 4 This folder contains a small standalone coding agent: 5 6 - code: `mini_coding_agent.py` 7 - CLI: `mini-coding-agent` 8 9 It is a minimal local agent loop with: 10 11 - workspace snapshot collection 12 - stable prompt plus turn state 13 - structured tools 14 - approval handling for risky tools 15 - transcript and memory persistence 16 - bounded delegation 17 18 The model backend is currently based on Ollama. 19 20 21 22
23 24 **Stay tuned for a more detailed tutorial to be linked here** 25 26   27 28 ## Requirements 29 30 You need: 31 32 - Python 3.10+ 33 - Ollama installed 34 - an Ollama model pulled locally 35 36 Optional: 37 38 - `uv` for environment management and the `mini-coding-agent` CLI entry point 39 40 This project has no Python runtime dependency beyond the standard library, so you can run it directly with `python mini_coding_agent.py` if you do not want to use `uv`. 41 42   43 ## Install Ollama 44 45 Install Ollama on your machine so the `ollama` command is available in your shell. 46 47 Official installation link: [ollama.com/download](https://ollama.com/download) 48 49 Then verify: 50 51 ```bash 52 ollama --help 53 ``` 54 55 Start the server: 56 57 ```bash 58 ollama serve 59 ``` 60 61 In another terminal, pull a model. Example: 62 63 ```bash 64 ollama pull qwen3.5:4b 65 ``` 66 67 Qwen 3.5 model library: 68 69 - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5) 70 71 The default in this project is `qwen3.5:4b`. If you have sufficient memory, it is worth trying a larger model such as `qwen3.5:9b` or another larger Qwen 3.5 variant. The agent just sends prompts to Ollama's `/api/generate` endpoint. 72 73   74 ## Project Setup 75 76 Clone the repo or your fork and change into it: 77 78 ```bash 79 git clone https://github.com/rasbt/mini-coding-agent.git 80 cd mini-coding-agent 81 ``` 82 83 If you forked it first, use your fork URL instead: 84 85 ```bash 86 git clone https://github.com//mini-coding-agent.git 87 cd mini-coding-agent 88 ``` 89 90 91 92   93 ## Basic Usage 94 95 Start the agent: 96 97 ```bash 98 cd mini-coding-agent 99 uv run mini-coding-agent 100 ``` 101 102 Without `uv`, run the script directly: 103 104 ```bash 105 cd mini-coding-agent 106 python mini_coding_agent.py 107 ``` 108 109 By default it uses: 110 111 - model: `qwen3.5:4b` 112 - approval: `ask` 113 114 For a concrete usage example, see [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md). 115 116   117 ## Approval Modes 118 119 Risky tools such as shell commands and file writes are gated by approval. 120 121 - `--approval ask` 122 prompts before risky actions (default and recommended) 123 - `--approval auto` 124 allows risky actions automatically (convenient but riskier) 125 - `--approval never` 126 denies risky actions 127 128 Example: 129 130 ```bash 131 uv run mini-coding-agent --approval auto 132 ``` 133 134 135 136   137 ## Resume Sessions 138 139 The agent saves sessions under the target workspace root in: 140 141 ```text 142 .mini-coding-agent/sessions/ 143 ``` 144 145 Resume the latest session: 146 147 ```bash 148 uv run mini-coding-agent --resume latest 149 ``` 150 151 152 Resume a specific session: 153 154 ```bash 155 uv run mini-coding-agent --resume 20260401-144025-2dd0aa 156 ``` 157 158 159   160 ## Interactive Commands 161 162 Inside the REPL, slash commands are handled directly by the agent instead of 163 being sent to the model as a normal task. 164 165 - `/help` 166 shows the list of available interactive commands 167 - `/memory` 168 prints the distilled session memory, including the current task, tracked files, and notes 169 - `/session` 170 prints the path to the current saved session JSON file 171 - `/reset` 172 clears the current session history and distilled memory but keeps you in the REPL 173 - `/exit` 174 exits the interactive session 175 - `/quit` 176 exits the interactive session; alias for `/exit` 177 178   179 ## Main CLI Flags 180 181 ```bash 182 uv run mini-coding-agent --help 183 ``` 184 185 Without `uv`: 186 187 ```bash 188 python mini_coding_agent.py --help 189 ``` 190 191 CLI flags are passed before the agent starts. Use them to choose the workspace, 192 model connection, resume behavior, approval mode, and generation limits. 193 194 Important flags: 195 196 - `--cwd` 197 sets the workspace directory the agent should inspect and modify; default: `.` 198 - `--model` 199 selects the Ollama model name, such as `qwen3.5:4b`; default: `qwen3.5:4b` 200 - `--host` 201 points the agent at the Ollama server URL (usually not needed); default: `http://127.0.0.1:11434` 202 - `--ollama-timeout` 203 controls how long the client waits for an Ollama response (usually not needed); default: `300` seconds 204 - `--resume` 205 resumes a saved session by id or uses `latest`; default: start a new session 206 - `--approval` 207 controls how risky tools are handled: `ask`, `auto`, or `never`; default: `ask` 208 - `--max-steps` 209 limits how many model and tool turns are allowed for one user request; default: `6` 210 - `--max-new-tokens` 211 caps the model output length for each step; default: `512` 212 - `--temperature` 213 controls sampling randomness; default: `0.2` 214 - `--top-p` 215 controls nucleus sampling for generation; default: `0.9` 216 217   218 ## Example 219 220 See [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md) 221 222   223 ## Notes & Tips 224 225 - The agent expects the model to emit either `...` or `...`. 226 - Different Ollama models will follow those instructions with different reliability. 227 - If the model does not follow the format well, use a stronger instruction-following model. 228 - The agent is intentionally small and optimized for readability, not robustness. 229 Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

# Mini-Coding-Agent This folder contains a small standalone coding agent: - code: `mini_coding_agent.py` - CLI: `mini-coding-agent` It is a minimal local agent loop with: - workspace snapshot collection - stable prompt plus turn state - structured tools - approval handling for risky tools - transcript and memory persistence - bounded delegation The model backend is currently based on Ollama.
**Stay tuned for a more detailed tutorial to be linked here**   ## Requirements You need: - Python 3.10+ - Ollama installed - an Ollama model pulled locally Optional: - `uv` for environment management and the `mini-coding-agent` CLI entry point This project has no Python runtime dependency beyond the standard library, so you can run it directly with `python mini_coding_agent.py` if you do not want to use `uv`.   ## Install Ollama Install Ollama on your machine so the `ollama` command is available in your shell. Official installation link: [ollama.com/download](https://ollama.com/download) Then verify: ```bash ollama --help ``` Start the server: ```bash ollama serve ``` In another terminal, pull a model. Example: ```bash ollama pull qwen3.5:4b ``` Qwen 3.5 model library: - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5) The default in this project is `qwen3.5:4b`. If you have sufficient memory, it is worth trying a larger model such as `qwen3.5:9b` or another larger Qwen 3.5 variant. The agent just sends prompts to Ollama's `/api/generate` endpoint.   ## Project Setup Clone the repo or your fork and change into it: ```bash git clone https://github.com/rasbt/mini-coding-agent.git cd mini-coding-agent ``` If you forked it first, use your fork URL instead: ```bash git clone https://github.com//mini-coding-agent.git cd mini-coding-agent ```   ## Basic Usage Start the agent: ```bash cd mini-coding-agent uv run mini-coding-agent ``` Without `uv`, run the script directly: ```bash cd mini-coding-agent python mini_coding_agent.py ``` By default it uses: - model: `qwen3.5:4b` - approval: `ask` For a concrete usage example, see [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md).   ## Approval Modes Risky tools such as shell commands and file writes are gated by approval. - `--approval ask` prompts before risky actions (default and recommended) - `--approval auto` allows risky actions automatically (convenient but riskier) - `--approval never` denies risky actions Example: ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --approval auto ```   ## Resume Sessions The agent saves sessions under the target workspace root in: ```text .mini-coding-agent/sessions/ ``` Resume the latest session: ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --resume latest ``` Resume a specific session: ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --resume 20260401-144025-2dd0aa ```   ## Interactive Commands Inside the REPL, slash commands are handled directly by the agent instead of being sent to the model as a normal task. - `/help` shows the list of available interactive commands - `/memory` prints the distilled session memory, including the current task, tracked files, and notes - `/session` prints the path to the current saved session JSON file - `/reset` clears the current session history and distilled memory but keeps you in the REPL - `/exit` exits the interactive session - `/quit` exits the interactive session; alias for `/exit`   ## Main CLI Flags ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --help ``` Without `uv`: ```bash python mini_coding_agent.py --help ``` CLI flags are passed before the agent starts. Use them to choose the workspace, model connection, resume behavior, approval mode, and generation limits. Important flags: - `--cwd` sets the workspace directory the agent should inspect and modify; default: `.` - `--model` selects the Ollama model name, such as `qwen3.5:4b`; default: `qwen3.5:4b` - `--host` points the agent at the Ollama server URL (usually not needed); default: `http://127.0.0.1:11434` - `--ollama-timeout` controls how long the client waits for an Ollama response (usually not needed); default: `300` seconds - `--resume` resumes a saved session by id or uses `latest`; default: start a new session - `--approval` controls how risky tools are handled: `ask`, `auto`, or `never`; default: `ask` - `--max-steps` limits how many model and tool turns are allowed for one user request; default: `6` - `--max-new-tokens` caps the model output length for each step; default: `512` - `--temperature` controls sampling randomness; default: `0.2` - `--top-p` controls nucleus sampling for generation; default: `0.9`   ## Example See [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md)   ## Notes & Tips - The agent expects the model to emit either `...` or `...`. - Different Ollama models will follow those instructions with different reliability. - If the model does not follow the format well, use a stronger instruction-following model. - The agent is intentionally small and optimized for readability, not robustness.

content.content: 1   2 # Interactive Example 3 4 This is a hands-on example workflow for using `mini-coding-agent` with Ollama on a small Python project. 5 6 The flow is: 7 8 1. create a fresh repo 9 2. launch the agent 10 3. implement `binary_search.py` 11 4. edit the implementation 12 5. add `pytest` tests 13 6. run tests 14 7. fix anything that fails 15 16 This example assumes: 17 18 - `ollama serve` is already running 19 - you already pulled a model such as `qwen3.5:4b` (e.g., via `ollama pull qwen3.5:4b` ) 20 - you already cloned or forked `rasbt/mini-coding-agent` 21 - you already ran `uv sync` in your local `mini-coding-agent` folder 22 23 If you have sufficient memory, consider using a larger Qwen 3.5 model instead: 24 25 - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5) 26 27   28 ## 1. Create a fresh repo 29 30 ```bash 31 cd mini-coding-agent 32 mkdir -p ./tmp/binary-search-repo 33 cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo 34 git init 35 ``` 36 37 At this point the repo is basically empty: 38 39 ```bash 40 ls -la 41 ``` 42 43   44 ## 2. Launch the agent 45 46 Open the agent from your `mini-coding-agent` clone, but point it at the new repo: 47 48 ```bash 49 cd mini-coding-agent 50 uv run mini-coding-agent \ 51 --cwd ./tmp/binary-search-repo \ 52 --model "qwen3.5:4b" 53 ``` 54 55 56 57 58 59   60 61 ## 3. Ask it to implement binary search 62 63 At the `mini-coding-agent>` prompt, paste: 64 65 ```text 66 Inspect this repository and create a minimal binary_search.py file. Implement an iterative binary_search(nums, target) function for a sorted list of integers. Return the index if the target exists and -1 if it does not. Keep the code very small. 67 ``` 68 69 After the agent finishes, inspect the result in another terminal or code editor. The contents are shown below: 70 71 72 73   74 ## 4. Ask it to edit the implementation 75 76 Now make a small follow-up change. Back in the agent REPL, paste: 77 78 ```text 79 Update binary_search.py so it raises ValueError if the input list is not sorted in ascending order. Keep the implementation simple. 80 ``` 81 82 Check the file again: 83 84 85 86   87 ## 5. Ask it to add unit tests 88 89 Back in the REPL, paste: 90 91 ```text 92 Create test_binary_search.py with pytest tests for found, missing, empty list, first element, last element, and unsorted input raising ValueError. Keep the tests small and readable. 93 ``` 94 95 Inspect the new test file: 96 97 98 99   100 ## 6. Ask it to run the tests 101 102 Back in the REPL, paste: 103 104 ```text 105 Run pytest for this repo. If any test fails, fix the code or tests and rerun until everything passes. 106 ``` 107 108 You can also verify manually in a different terminal window: 109 110 ``` 111 uv run pytest tmp/binary-search-repo 112 ``` 113 114   115 ## 7. Inspect the final repo state 116 117 Check what changed: 118 119 ```bash 120 cd mini-coding-agent 121 cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo 122 git status --short 123 ``` 124 125 You should now have: 126 127 - `README.md` 128 - `binary_search.py` 129 - `test_binary_search.py` 130 131   132 ## 8. Useful interactive commands 133 134 While the agent is running, these commands are available: 135 136 - `/help` shows the available slash commands and what each one does. 137 - `/memory` prints the agent's distilled working memory for the current session. 138 - `/session` shows the path to the saved session JSON file on disk. 139 - `/reset` clears the current conversation history and working memory. 140 - `/exit` leaves the interactive agent. 141 Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

The flow is: 1. create a fresh repo 2. launch the agent 3. implement `binary_search.py` 4. edit the implementation 5. add `pytest` tests 6. run tests 7. fix anything that fails This example assumes: - `ollama serve` is already running - you already pulled a model such as `qwen3.5:4b` (e.g., via `ollama pull qwen3.5:4b` ) - you already cloned or forked `rasbt/mini-coding-agent` - you already ran `uv sync` in your local `mini-coding-agent` folder If you have sufficient memory, consider using a larger Qwen 3.5 model instead: - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5)   ## 1. Create a fresh repo ```bash cd mini-coding-agent mkdir -p ./tmp/binary-search-repo cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git init ``` At this point the repo is basically empty: ```bash ls -la ```   ## 2. Launch the agent Open the agent from your `mini-coding-agent` clone, but point it at the new repo: ```bash cd mini-coding-agent uv run mini-coding-agent \ --cwd ./tmp/binary-search-repo \ --model "qwen3.5:4b" ```   ## 3. Ask it to implement binary search At the `mini-coding-agent>` prompt, paste: ```text Inspect this repository and create a minimal binary_search.py file. Implement an iterative binary_search(nums, target) function for a sorted list of integers. Return the index if the target exists and -1 if it does not. Keep the code very small. ``` After the agent finishes, inspect the result in another terminal or code editor. The contents are shown below:   ## 4. Ask it to edit the implementation Now make a small follow-up change. Back in the agent REPL, paste: ```text Update binary_search.py so it raises ValueError if the input list is not sorted in ascending order. Keep the implementation simple. ``` Check the file again:   ## 5. Ask it to add unit tests Back in the REPL, paste: ```text Create test_binary_search.py with pytest tests for found, missing, empty list, first element, last element, and unsorted input raising ValueError. Keep the tests small and readable. ``` Inspect the new test file:   ## 6. Ask it to run the tests Back in the REPL, paste: ```text Run pytest for this repo. If any test fails, fix the code or tests and rerun until everything passes. ``` You can also verify manually in a different terminal window: ``` uv run pytest tmp/binary-search-repo ```   ## 7. Inspect the final repo state Check what changed: ```bash cd mini-coding-agent cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git status --short ``` You should now have: - `README.md` - `binary_search.py` - `test_binary_search.py`   ## 8. Useful interactive commands While the agent is running, these commands are available: - `/help` shows the available slash commands and what each one does. - `/memory` prints the agent's distilled working memory for the current session. - `/session` shows the path to the saved session JSON file on disk. - `/reset` clears the current conversation history and working memory. - `/exit` leaves the interactive agent.

input.content:
# Mini-Coding-Agent 本文件夹包含一个轻量级独立的编程智能体： - 代码：`mini_coding_agent.py` - CLI：`mini-coding-agent` 这是一个极简的本地智能体循环，具有以下特性： - 工作区快照收集 - 稳定的提示词和轮次状态 - 结构化工具 - 危险工具的审批处理 - 对话记录和记忆持久化 - 有边界的委托 当前模型后端基于 Ollama。
**更多详细教程即将发布**   ## 环境要求 你需要： - Python 3.10+ - 安装 Ollama - 本地已拉取一个 Ollama 模型 可选： - `uv` 用于环境管理和 `mini-coding-agent` CLI 入口 本项目除了标准库外没有其他 Python 运行时依赖，如果你不想使用 `uv`，可以直接用 `python mini_coding_agent.py` 运行。   ## 安装 Ollama 在你的机器上安装 Ollama，使 `ollama` 命令在你的 shell 中可用。 官方安装链接：[ollama.com/download](https://ollama.com/download) 然后验证： ```bash ollama --help ``` 启动服务： ```bash ollama serve ``` 在另一个终端中，拉取一个模型。例如： ```bash ollama pull qwen3.5:4b ``` Qwen 3.5 模型库： - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5) 本项目默认使用 `qwen3.5:4b`。如果你的内存充足，值得尝试更大的模型如 `qwen3.5:9b` 或其他更大的 Qwen 3.5 变体。智能体只是将提示词发送到 Ollama 的 `/api/generate` 端点。   ## 项目设置 克隆仓库或你的 fork 并进入目录： ```bash git clone https://github.com/rasbt/mini-coding-agent.git cd mini-coding-agent ``` 如果你先 fork 了，请使用你的 fork URL： ```bash git clone https://github.com//mini-coding-agent.git cd mini-coding-agent ```   ## 基本用法 启动智能体： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent uv run mini-coding-agent ``` 不使用 `uv` 时，直接运行脚本： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent python mini_coding_agent.py ``` 默认配置： - 模型：`qwen3.5:4b` - 审批模式：`ask` 具体使用示例，请参阅 [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md)。   ## 审批模式 危险工具（如 shell 命令和文件写入）需要审批。 - `--approval ask` 执行危险操作前提示确认（默认，推荐） - `--approval auto` 自动允许危险操作（更方便但有风险） - `--approval never` 拒绝执行危险操作 示例： ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --approval auto ```   ## 恢复会话 智能体会将会话保存到目标工作区根目录的以下位置： ```text .mini-coding-agent/sessions/ ``` 恢复最新会话： ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --resume latest ``` 恢复指定会话： ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --resume 20260401-144025-2dd0aa ```   ## 交互命令 在 REPL 内，斜杠命令由智能体直接处理，而不是作为普通任务发送给模型。 - `/help` 显示可用交互命令列表 - `/memory` 打印提炼后的会话记忆，包括当前任务、跟踪的文件和笔记 - `/session` 打印当前已保存会话 JSON 文件的路径 - `/reset` 清除当前会话历史和提炼记忆，但保持在 REPL 中 - `/exit` 退出交互会话 - `/quit` 退出交互会话；`/exit` 的别名   ## 主要 CLI 参数 ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --help ``` 不使用 `uv`： ```bash python mini_coding_agent.py --help ``` CLI 参数在智能体启动前传递。使用它们来选择工作区、模型连接、恢复行为、审批模式和生成限制。 重要参数： - `--cwd` 设置智能体应检查和修改的工作区目录；默认值：`.` - `--model` 选择 Ollama 模型名称，如 `qwen3.5:4b`；默认值：`qwen3.5:4b` - `--host` 指定智能体连接的 Ollama 服务器 URL（通常不需要）；默认值：`http://127.0.0.1:11434` - `--ollama-timeout` 控制客户端等待 Ollama 响应的时长（通常不需要）；默认值：`300` 秒 - `--resume` 通过 id 恢复已保存的会话，或使用 `latest`；默认值：启动新会话 - `--approval` 控制危险工具的处理方式：`ask`、`auto` 或 `never`；默认值：`ask` - `--max-steps` 限制单个用户请求允许的模型和工具轮次数量；默认值：`6` - `--max-new-tokens` 限制每步的模型输出长度；默认值：`512` - `--temperature` 控制采样随机性；默认值：`0.2` - `--top-p` 控制核采样的生成；默认值：`0.9`   ## 示例 请参阅 [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md)   ## 注意事项 - 智能体期望模型输出 `...` 或 `...`。 - 不同的 Ollama 模型会以不同的可靠性遵循这些指令。 - 如果模型不能很好地遵循格式，请使用更强的指令遵循模型。 - 智能体有意设计得小而优化以提高可读性，而非健壮性。

# 交互示例 这是一个在小型 Python 项目中使用 `mini-coding-agent` 配合 Ollama 的实战工作流示例。 流程如下： 1. 创建一个全新的仓库 2. 启动智能体 3. 实现 `binary_search.py` 4. 编辑实现 5. 添加 `pytest` 测试 6. 运行测试 7. 修复任何失败的测试 本示例假设： - `ollama serve` 已在运行 - 你已经拉取了模型如 `qwen3.5:4b`（例如通过 `ollama pull qwen3.5:4b`） - 你已经克隆或 fork 了 `rasbt/mini-coding-agent` - 你已在本地 `mini-coding-agent` 文件夹中运行了 `uv sync` 如果你的内存充足，考虑使用更大的 Qwen 3.5 模型： - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5)   ## 1. 创建一个全新的仓库 ```bash cd mini-coding-agent mkdir -p ./tmp/binary-search-repo cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git init ``` 此时仓库基本上是空的： ```bash ls -la ```   ## 2. 启动智能体 从你的 `mini-coding-agent` 克隆中启动智能体，但指向新仓库： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent uv run mini-coding-agent \ --cwd ./tmp/binary-search-repo \ --model "qwen3.5:4b" ```   ## 3. 让它实现二分搜索 在 `mini-coding-agent>` 提示符下，粘贴： ```text 检查这个仓库并创建一个 minimal 的 binary_search.py 文件。实现一个迭代的 binary_search(nums, target) 函数，用于在已排序的整数列表中查找。如果目标存在则返回其索引，不存在则返回 -1。保持代码非常简洁。 ``` 智能体完成后，在另一个终端或代码编辑器中检查结果。内容如下：   ## 4. 让它编辑实现 现在做一个小的后续更改。回到智能体 REPL，粘贴： ```text 更新 binary_search.py，使其在输入列表未按升序排序时抛出 ValueError。保持实现简单。 ``` 再次检查文件：   ## 5. 让它添加单元测试 回到 REPL，粘贴： ```text 创建 test_binary_search.py，包含 pytest 测试用例，覆盖：找到目标、未找到目标、空列表、第一个元素、最后一个元素，以及未排序输入抛出 ValueError。保持测试小而可读。 ``` 检查新的测试文件：   ## 6. 让它运行测试 回到 REPL，粘贴： ```text 为这个仓库运行 pytest。如果任何测试失败，修复代码或测试并重新运行，直到所有测试通过。 ``` 你也可以在另一个终端窗口中手动验证： ``` uv run pytest tmp/binary-search-repo ```   ## 7. 检查最终仓库状态 检查变更： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git status --short ``` 你现在应该有以下文件： - `README.md` - `binary_search.py` - `test_binary_search.py`   ## 8. 有用的交互命令 智能体运行时，以下命令可用： - `/help` 显示可用的斜杠命令及其功能说明。 - `/memory` 打印智能体当前会话的提炼工作记忆。 - `/session` 显示已保存会话 JSON 文件在磁盘上的路径。 - `/reset` 清除当前对话历史和工作记忆。 - `/exit` 离开交互式智能体。

toolUseResult.content:
# Mini-Coding-Agent 本文件夹包含一个轻量级独立的编程智能体： - 代码：`mini_coding_agent.py` - CLI：`mini-coding-agent` 这是一个极简的本地智能体循环，具有以下特性： - 工作区快照收集 - 稳定的提示词和轮次状态 - 结构化工具 - 危险工具的审批处理 - 对话记录和记忆持久化 - 有边界的委托 当前模型后端基于 Ollama。
**更多详细教程即将发布**   ## 环境要求 你需要： - Python 3.10+ - 安装 Ollama - 本地已拉取一个 Ollama 模型 可选： - `uv` 用于环境管理和 `mini-coding-agent` CLI 入口 本项目除了标准库外没有其他 Python 运行时依赖，如果你不想使用 `uv`，可以直接用 `python mini_coding_agent.py` 运行。   ## 安装 Ollama 在你的机器上安装 Ollama，使 `ollama` 命令在你的 shell 中可用。 官方安装链接：[ollama.com/download](https://ollama.com/download) 然后验证： ```bash ollama --help ``` 启动服务： ```bash ollama serve ``` 在另一个终端中，拉取一个模型。例如： ```bash ollama pull qwen3.5:4b ``` Qwen 3.5 模型库： - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5) 本项目默认使用 `qwen3.5:4b`。如果你的内存充足，值得尝试更大的模型如 `qwen3.5:9b` 或其他更大的 Qwen 3.5 变体。智能体只是将提示词发送到 Ollama 的 `/api/generate` 端点。   ## 项目设置 克隆仓库或你的 fork 并进入目录： ```bash git clone https://github.com/rasbt/mini-coding-agent.git cd mini-coding-agent ``` 如果你先 fork 了，请使用你的 fork URL： ```bash git clone https://github.com//mini-coding-agent.git cd mini-coding-agent ```   ## 基本用法 启动智能体： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent uv run mini-coding-agent ``` 不使用 `uv` 时，直接运行脚本： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent python mini_coding_agent.py ``` 默认配置： - 模型：`qwen3.5:4b` - 审批模式：`ask` 具体使用示例，请参阅 [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md)。   ## 审批模式 危险工具（如 shell 命令和文件写入）需要审批。 - `--approval ask` 执行危险操作前提示确认（默认，推荐） - `--approval auto` 自动允许危险操作（更方便但有风险） - `--approval never` 拒绝执行危险操作 示例： ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --approval auto ```   ## 恢复会话 智能体会将会话保存到目标工作区根目录的以下位置： ```text .mini-coding-agent/sessions/ ``` 恢复最新会话： ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --resume latest ``` 恢复指定会话： ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --resume 20260401-144025-2dd0aa ```   ## 交互命令 在 REPL 内，斜杠命令由智能体直接处理，而不是作为普通任务发送给模型。 - `/help` 显示可用交互命令列表 - `/memory` 打印提炼后的会话记忆，包括当前任务、跟踪的文件和笔记 - `/session` 打印当前已保存会话 JSON 文件的路径 - `/reset` 清除当前会话历史和提炼记忆，但保持在 REPL 中 - `/exit` 退出交互会话 - `/quit` 退出交互会话；`/exit` 的别名   ## 主要 CLI 参数 ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --help ``` 不使用 `uv`： ```bash python mini_coding_agent.py --help ``` CLI 参数在智能体启动前传递。使用它们来选择工作区、模型连接、恢复行为、审批模式和生成限制。 重要参数： - `--cwd` 设置智能体应检查和修改的工作区目录；默认值：`.` - `--model` 选择 Ollama 模型名称，如 `qwen3.5:4b`；默认值：`qwen3.5:4b` - `--host` 指定智能体连接的 Ollama 服务器 URL（通常不需要）；默认值：`http://127.0.0.1:11434` - `--ollama-timeout` 控制客户端等待 Ollama 响应的时长（通常不需要）；默认值：`300` 秒 - `--resume` 通过 id 恢复已保存的会话，或使用 `latest`；默认值：启动新会话 - `--approval` 控制危险工具的处理方式：`ask`、`auto` 或 `never`；默认值：`ask` - `--max-steps` 限制单个用户请求允许的模型和工具轮次数量；默认值：`6` - `--max-new-tokens` 限制每步的模型输出长度；默认值：`512` - `--temperature` 控制采样随机性；默认值：`0.2` - `--top-p` 控制核采样的生成；默认值：`0.9`   ## 示例 请参阅 [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md)   ## 注意事项 - 智能体期望模型输出 `...` 或 `...`。 - 不同的 Ollama 模型会以不同的可靠性遵循这些指令。 - 如果模型不能很好地遵循格式，请使用更强的指令遵循模型。 - 智能体有意设计得小而优化以提高可读性，而非健壮性。

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Mini-Coding-Agent This folder contains a small standalone coding agent: - code: `mini_coding_agent.py` - CLI: `mini-coding-agent` It is a minimal local agent loop with: - workspace snapshot collection - stable prompt plus turn state - structured tools - approval handling for risky tools - transcript and memory persistence - bounded delegation The model backend is currently based on Ollama.
**Stay tuned for a more detailed tutorial to be linked here**   ## Requirements You need: - Python 3.10+ - Ollama installed - an Ollama model pulled locally Optional: - `uv` for environment management and the `mini-coding-agent` CLI entry point This project has no Python runtime dependency beyond the standard library, so you can run it directly with `python mini_coding_agent.py` if you do not want to use `uv`.   ## Install Ollama Install Ollama on your machine so the `ollama` command is available in your shell. Official installation link: [ollama.com/download](https://ollama.com/download) Then verify: ```bash ollama --help ``` Start the server: ```bash ollama serve ``` In another terminal, pull a model. Example: ```bash ollama pull qwen3.5:4b ``` Qwen 3.5 model library: - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5) The default in this project is `qwen3.5:4b`. If you have sufficient memory, it is worth trying a larger model such as `qwen3.5:9b` or another larger Qwen 3.5 variant. The agent just sends prompts to Ollama's `/api/generate` endpoint.   ## Project Setup Clone the repo or your fork and change into it: ```bash git clone https://github.com/rasbt/mini-coding-agent.git cd mini-coding-agent ``` If you forked it first, use your fork URL instead: ```bash git clone https://github.com//mini-coding-agent.git cd mini-coding-agent ```   ## Basic Usage Start the agent: ```bash cd mini-coding-agent uv run mini-coding-agent ``` Without `uv`, run the script directly: ```bash cd mini-coding-agent python mini_coding_agent.py ``` By default it uses: - model: `qwen3.5:4b` - approval: `ask` For a concrete usage example, see [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md).   ## Approval Modes Risky tools such as shell commands and file writes are gated by approval. - `--approval ask` prompts before risky actions (default and recommended) - `--approval auto` allows risky actions automatically (convenient but riskier) - `--approval never` denies risky actions Example: ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --approval auto ```   ## Resume Sessions The agent saves sessions under the target workspace root in: ```text .mini-coding-agent/sessions/ ``` Resume the latest session: ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --resume latest ``` Resume a specific session: ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --resume 20260401-144025-2dd0aa ```   ## Interactive Commands Inside the REPL, slash commands are handled directly by the agent instead of being sent to the model as a normal task. - `/help` shows the list of available interactive commands - `/memory` prints the distilled session memory, including the current task, tracked files, and notes - `/session` prints the path to the current saved session JSON file - `/reset` clears the current session history and distilled memory but keeps you in the REPL - `/exit` exits the interactive session - `/quit` exits the interactive session; alias for `/exit`   ## Main CLI Flags ```bash uv run mini-coding-agent --help ``` Without `uv`: ```bash python mini_coding_agent.py --help ``` CLI flags are passed before the agent starts. Use them to choose the workspace, model connection, resume behavior, approval mode, and generation limits. Important flags: - `--cwd` sets the workspace directory the agent should inspect and modify; default: `.` - `--model` selects the Ollama model name, such as `qwen3.5:4b`; default: `qwen3.5:4b` - `--host` points the agent at the Ollama server URL (usually not needed); default: `http://127.0.0.1:11434` - `--ollama-timeout` controls how long the client waits for an Ollama response (usually not needed); default: `300` seconds - `--resume` resumes a saved session by id or uses `latest`; default: start a new session - `--approval` controls how risky tools are handled: `ask`, `auto`, or `never`; default: `ask` - `--max-steps` limits how many model and tool turns are allowed for one user request; default: `6` - `--max-new-tokens` caps the model output length for each step; default: `512` - `--temperature` controls sampling randomness; default: `0.2` - `--top-p` controls nucleus sampling for generation; default: `0.9`   ## Example See [EXAMPLE.md](EXAMPLE.md)   ## Notes & Tips - The agent expects the model to emit either `...` or `...`. - Different Ollama models will follow those instructions with different reliability. - If the model does not follow the format well, use a stronger instruction-following model. - The agent is intentionally small and optimized for readability, not robustness.

toolUseResult.content: # 交互示例 这是一个在小型 Python 项目中使用 `mini-coding-agent` 配合 Ollama 的实战工作流示例。 流程如下： 1. 创建一个全新的仓库 2. 启动智能体 3. 实现 `binary_search.py` 4. 编辑实现 5. 添加 `pytest` 测试 6. 运行测试 7. 修复任何失败的测试 本示例假设： - `ollama serve` 已在运行 - 你已经拉取了模型如 `qwen3.5:4b`（例如通过 `ollama pull qwen3.5:4b`） - 你已经克隆或 fork 了 `rasbt/mini-coding-agent` - 你已在本地 `mini-coding-agent` 文件夹中运行了 `uv sync` 如果你的内存充足，考虑使用更大的 Qwen 3.5 模型： - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5)   ## 1. 创建一个全新的仓库 ```bash cd mini-coding-agent mkdir -p ./tmp/binary-search-repo cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git init ``` 此时仓库基本上是空的： ```bash ls -la ```   ## 2. 启动智能体 从你的 `mini-coding-agent` 克隆中启动智能体，但指向新仓库： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent uv run mini-coding-agent \ --cwd ./tmp/binary-search-repo \ --model "qwen3.5:4b" ```   ## 3. 让它实现二分搜索 在 `mini-coding-agent>` 提示符下，粘贴： ```text 检查这个仓库并创建一个 minimal 的 binary_search.py 文件。实现一个迭代的 binary_search(nums, target) 函数，用于在已排序的整数列表中查找。如果目标存在则返回其索引，不存在则返回 -1。保持代码非常简洁。 ``` 智能体完成后，在另一个终端或代码编辑器中检查结果。内容如下：   ## 4. 让它编辑实现 现在做一个小的后续更改。回到智能体 REPL，粘贴： ```text 更新 binary_search.py，使其在输入列表未按升序排序时抛出 ValueError。保持实现简单。 ``` 再次检查文件：   ## 5. 让它添加单元测试 回到 REPL，粘贴： ```text 创建 test_binary_search.py，包含 pytest 测试用例，覆盖：找到目标、未找到目标、空列表、第一个元素、最后一个元素，以及未排序输入抛出 ValueError。保持测试小而可读。 ``` 检查新的测试文件：   ## 6. 让它运行测试 回到 REPL，粘贴： ```text 为这个仓库运行 pytest。如果任何测试失败，修复代码或测试并重新运行，直到所有测试通过。 ``` 你也可以在另一个终端窗口中手动验证： ``` uv run pytest tmp/binary-search-repo ```   ## 7. 检查最终仓库状态 检查变更： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git status --short ``` 你现在应该有以下文件： - `README.md` - `binary_search.py` - `test_binary_search.py`   ## 8. 有用的交互命令 智能体运行时，以下命令可用： - `/help` 显示可用的斜杠命令及其功能说明。 - `/memory` 打印智能体当前会话的提炼工作记忆。 - `/session` 显示已保存会话 JSON 文件在磁盘上的路径。 - `/reset` 清除当前对话历史和工作记忆。 - `/exit` 离开交互式智能体。

toolUseResult.originalFile: # Interactive Example This is a hands-on example workflow for using `mini-coding-agent` with Ollama on a small Python project. The flow is: 1. create a fresh repo 2. launch the agent 3. implement `binary_search.py` 4. edit the implementation 5. add `pytest` tests 6. run tests 7. fix anything that fails This example assumes: - `ollama serve` is already running - you already pulled a model such as `qwen3.5:4b` (e.g., via `ollama pull qwen3.5:4b` ) - you already cloned or forked `rasbt/mini-coding-agent` - you already ran `uv sync` in your local `mini-coding-agent` folder If you have sufficient memory, consider using a larger Qwen 3.5 model instead: - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5)   ## 1. Create a fresh repo ```bash cd mini-coding-agent mkdir -p ./tmp/binary-search-repo cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git init ``` At this point the repo is basically empty: ```bash ls -la ```   ## 2. Launch the agent Open the agent from your `mini-coding-agent` clone, but point it at the new repo: ```bash cd mini-coding-agent uv run mini-coding-agent \ --cwd ./tmp/binary-search-repo \ --model "qwen3.5:4b" ```   ## 3. Ask it to implement binary search At the `mini-coding-agent>` prompt, paste: ```text Inspect this repository and create a minimal binary_search.py file. Implement an iterative binary_search(nums, target) function for a sorted list of integers. Return the index if the target exists and -1 if it does not. Keep the code very small. ``` After the agent finishes, inspect the result in another terminal or code editor. The contents are shown below:   ## 4. Ask it to edit the implementation Now make a small follow-up change. Back in the agent REPL, paste: ```text Update binary_search.py so it raises ValueError if the input list is not sorted in ascending order. Keep the implementation simple. ``` Check the file again:   ## 5. Ask it to add unit tests Back in the REPL, paste: ```text Create test_binary_search.py with pytest tests for found, missing, empty list, first element, last element, and unsorted input raising ValueError. Keep the tests small and readable. ``` Inspect the new test file:   ## 6. Ask it to run the tests Back in the REPL, paste: ```text Run pytest for this repo. If any test fails, fix the code or tests and rerun until everything passes. ``` You can also verify manually in a different terminal window: ``` uv run pytest tmp/binary-search-repo ```   ## 7. Inspect the final repo state Check what changed: ```bash cd mini-coding-agent cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git status --short ``` You should now have: - `README.md` - `binary_search.py` - `test_binary_search.py`   ## 8. Useful interactive commands While the agent is running, these commands are available: - `/help` shows the available slash commands and what each one does. - `/memory` prints the agent's distilled working memory for the current session. - `/session` shows the path to the saved session JSON file on disk. - `/reset` clears the current conversation history and working memory. - `/exit` leaves the interactive agent.

content.thinking: 用户问 commit 是干什么的，这是一个关于 git 基本概念的问题，我应该简单解释一下。

content.text:
`git commit` 是**将暂存的更改记录到本地仓库**的操作。

简单类比：

| 概念 | 类比 |
|------|------|
| `git add` | 把文件放入购物车 |
| `git commit` | 确认订单（生成记录） |
| `git push` | 商家发货（上传到远程） |

**工作流程：**
1. 修改文件 → 文件还在本地
2. `git add` → 暂存更改
3. `git commit` → 创建本地提交记录
4. `git push` → 推送到 GitHub

你的更改现在处于第 2 步和第 3 步之间 —— 已暂存但未提交，所以 push 时显示 "Everything up-to-date"（远程没有新的 commit 可推）。

那我修改了readme，如果以后远程分枝修改readme，那我fetch的时候会怎么样

content.thinking:
The user is asking a hypothetical question about what happens if they modify README locally, and meanwhile the remote branch also modifies README. What happens during fetch?

This is about git's fetch behavior when there are conflicting changes on the same file.

Let me explain this clearly:

1. `git fetch` only downloads new commits from remote - it does NOT automatically merge or overwrite your local files
2. The fetched commits go into a separate "remote tracking branch" (like origin/main)
3. Your local commits remain in your local main branch
4. If you then try to `git push`, you'll get a conflict error if the remote has diverged

So the answer is: fetch itself won't overwrite anything. The conflict only happens when you try to merge/push.

content.text:
`git fetch` **不会自动合并或覆盖**你的本地文件，它只是下载远程的新提交到本地。

**实际流程：**

1. 你本地修改了 README
2. 远程也有人修改了 README 并 push
3. 你 `git fetch` → README 文件**不会变**，只是远程的提交记录被下载到 `origin/main`
4. 此时状态是：你的 main 和 `origin/main` 指向不同的 commit（分叉了）

**冲突发生在 merge/push 时：**

- `git pull` = fetch + merge，会尝试合并，可能冲突
- `git push` = 如果远程有你没有的提交，会被拒绝（not "fast-forward"）

冲突后 Git 会让你手动选择保留哪个版本，或者合并修改。
为什么这个分支又出来了：entire/checkpoints/v1

content.thinking: The user is asking why the `entire/checkpoints/v1` branch came back. Let me check the current branches again to see what's happening.

content.content:
entire/checkpoints/v1

我git fetch upstream以后，如何让github仓库这次更新

content.thinking:
The user wants to sync the upstream changes to their GitHub fork. GitHub仓库 = their fork on GitHub (origin).

Currently:
- `upstream` = rasbt/mini-coding-agent (original repo)
- `origin` = xiaotouming1011/mini-coding-agent (their fork)

`git fetch upstream` only downloads upstream changes locally. It doesn't automatically push to origin.

To update their GitHub fork with upstream changes, they need to:
1. Fetch from upstream (done)
2. Merge or rebase their main with upstream/main
3. Push to origin

Let me explain the steps.

content.text:
`git fetch upstream` 只是下载上游更新到本地，**不会自动推送到你的 GitHub fork**。

需要三步：

```bash
# 1. 确保在 main 分支
git checkout main

# 2. 合并上游更新到本地 main
git merge upstream/main

# 3. 推送到你的 GitHub fork
git push origin main
```

或者如果你想更干净的历史，可以用 rebase：

```bash
git rebase upstream/main
git push origin main --force  # 需要 --force 因为历史改变了
```

**注意**：`--force` 会覆盖远程历史，如果你 main 上有独特的提交（比如翻译），建议用 merge 避免冲突。

content.text:
找到原因了！这不是 Claude Code 内置的检查点功能，而是 **`entire` 插件**在创建这些分支。

从你的 `~/.claude/settings.json` 可以看到：

```json
"hooks": {
  "SessionStart": [{ "command": "entire hooks claude-code session-start", ... }],
  "Stop": [{ "command": "entire hooks claude-code stop", ... }],
  ...
}
```

**entire** 是一个 Claude Code 扩展插件，它的 `hooks claude-code` 命令会创建 Git 分支来保存检查点。

**解决方案：**

1. **禁用 entire 插件** — 从 Claude Code 设置中关闭 entire 扩展
2. **或者删除 hooks 中的 entire 相关配置** — 编辑 `~/.claude/settings.json`，删除所有 `entire hooks claude-code ...` 的 hook 条目

如果你想保留 entire 功能但不想它创建 Git 分支，需要查看 entire 插件的文档看是否有相关配置选项。

你知道这个 `entire` 插件是什么吗？是你自己安装的吗？
算了，不禁用他

教我如何切换成我下载好的模型，我不想下qwen3.5

content.thinking:
The user wants to switch from the default qwen3.5:4b model to one of the qwen3 models they already have downloaded (qwen3:0.6b, qwen3:4b-q4_K_M, or qwen3:4b).

Looking at the README.md we translated earlier, the model can be specified with the `--model` flag:
```
uv run mini-coding-agent --model "qwen3.5:4b"
```

So they just need to replace "qwen3.5:4b" with their preferred model like "qwen3:4b".

Let me explain how to do this.

content.text:
很简单，直接用 `--model` 参数指定你下载好的模型：

```bash
# 使用 qwen3:4b（2.5GB）
uv run mini-coding-agent --model "qwen3:4b"

# 或 qwen3:0.6b（最小，522MB）
uv run mini-coding-agent --model "qwen3:0.6b"

# 或 qwen3:4b-q4_K_M（2.6GB）
uv run mini-coding-agent --model "qwen3:4b-q4_K_M"
```

不加 `--model` 参数默认用的是 `qwen3.5:4b`（需要下载）。

**如果想永久默认使用你下载的模型**，可以修改 README 里提到的默认配置，或者创建一个快捷命令别名：

```bash
alias mca='uv run mini-coding-agent --model "qwen3:4b"'
```

然后直接用 `mca` 启动即可。

content.text:
这是 **创建目录**的命令：

```bash
mkdir -p ./tmp/binary-search-repo
```

| 部分 | 含义 |
|------|------|
| `mkdir` | make directory，创建目录 |
| `-p` | 如果父目录不存在也一并创建，不报错 |
| `./tmp/binary-search-repo` | 要创建的目录路径 |

**作用：** 在当前目录下创建 `tmp/binary-search-repo` 路径。

**效果：**
```

```

file.content: # 交互示例 这是一个在小型 Python 项目中使用 `mini-coding-agent` 配合 Ollama 的实战工作流示例。 流程如下： 1. 创建一个全新的仓库 2. 启动智能体 3. 实现 `binary_search.py` 4. 编辑实现 5. 添加 `pytest` 测试 6. 运行测试 7. 修复任何失败的测试 本示例假设： - `ollama serve` 已在运行 - 你已经拉取了模型如 `qwen3.5:4b`（例如通过 `ollama pull qwen3.5:4b`） - 你已经克隆或 fork 了 `rasbt/mini-coding-agent` - 你已在本地 `mini-coding-agent` 文件夹中运行了 `uv sync` 如果你的内存充足，考虑使用更大的 Qwen 3.5 模型： - [ollama.com/library/qwen3.5](https://ollama.com/library/qwen3.5)   ## 1. 创建一个全新的仓库 ```bash cd mini-coding-agent mkdir -p ./tmp/binary-search-repo cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git init ``` 此时仓库基本上是空的： ```bash ls -la ```   ## 2. 启动智能体 从你的 `mini-coding-agent` 克隆中启动智能体，但指向新仓库： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent uv run mini-coding-agent \ --cwd ./tmp/binary-search-repo \ --model "qwen3.5:4b" ```   ## 3. 让它实现二分搜索 在 `mini-coding-agent>` 提示符下，粘贴： ```text 检查这个仓库并创建一个 minimal 的 binary_search.py 文件。实现一个迭代的 binary_search(nums, target) 函数，用于在已排序的整数列表中查找。如果目标存在则返回其索引，不存在则返回 -1。保持代码非常简洁。 ``` 智能体完成后，在另一个终端或代码编辑器中检查结果。内容如下：   ## 4. 让它编辑实现 现在做一个小的后续更改。回到智能体 REPL，粘贴： ```text 更新 binary_search.py，使其在输入列表未按升序排序时抛出 ValueError。保持实现简单。 ``` 再次检查文件：   ## 5. 让它添加单元测试 回到 REPL，粘贴： ```text 创建 test_binary_search.py，包含 pytest 测试用例，覆盖：找到目标、未找到目标、空列表、第一个元素、最后一个元素，以及未排序输入抛出 ValueError。保持测试小而可读。 ``` 检查新的测试文件：   ## 6. 让它运行测试 回到 REPL，粘贴： ```text 为这个仓库运行 pytest。如果任何测试失败，修复代码或测试并重新运行，直到所有测试通过。 ``` 你也可以在另一个终端窗口中手动验证： ``` uv run pytest tmp/binary-search-repo ```   ## 7. 检查最终仓库状态 检查变更： ```bash cd mini-coding-agent cd ./tmp/binary-search-repo git status --short ``` 你现在应该有以下文件： - `README.md` - `binary_search.py` - `test_binary_search.py`   ## 8. 有用的交互命令 智能体运行时，以下命令可用： - `/help` 显示可用的斜杠命令及其功能说明。 - `/memory` 打印智能体当前会话的提炼工作记忆。 - `/session` 显示已保存会话 JSON 文件在磁盘上的路径。 - `/reset` 清除当前对话历史和工作记忆。 - `/exit` 离开交互式智能体。

677	    def parse_xml_tool(raw):
678	        match = re.search(r"<tool(?P<attrs>[^>]*)>(?P<body>.*?)</tool>", raw, re.S)
679	        if not match:
680	            return None
681	        attrs = MiniAgent.parse_attrs(match.group("attrs"))
682	        name = str(attrs.pop("name", "")).strip()
683	        if not name:
684	            return None
685	
686	        body = match.group("body")
687	        args = dict(attrs)
688	        for key in ("content", "old_text", "new_text", "command", "task", "pattern", "path"):
689	            if f"<{key}>" in body:
690	                args[key] = MiniAgent.extract_raw(body, key)
691	
692	        body_text = body.strip("\n")
693	        if name == "write_file" and "content" not in args and body_text:
694	            args["content"] = body_text
695	        if name == "delegate" and "task" not in args and body_text:
696	            args["task"] = body_text.strip()
697	        return {"name": name, "args": args}
698	
699	    @staticmethod
700	    def parse_attrs(text):
701	        attrs = {}
702	        for match in re.finditer(r"""([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\s*=\s*(?:"([^"]*)"|'([^']*)')""", text):
703	            attrs[match.group(1)] = match.group(2) if match.group(2) is not None else match.group(3)
704	        return attrs
705	
706	    @staticmethod
707	    def extract(text, tag):
708	        start_tag = f"<{tag}>"
709	        end_tag = f"</{tag}>"
710	        start = text.find(start_tag)
711	        if start == -1:
712	            return text
713	        start += len(start_tag)
714	        end = text.find(end_tag, start)
715	        if end == -1:
716	            return text[start:].strip()
717	        return text[start:end].strip()
718	
719	    @staticmethod
720	    def extract_raw(text, tag):
721	        start_tag = f"<{tag}>"
722	        end_tag = f"</{tag}>"
723	        start = text.find(start_tag)
724	        if start == -1:
725	            return text
726	        start += len(start_tag)

找到问题了！

看 `mini_coding_agent.py` 第 633-638 行：

```python
if "<tool>" in raw and ...:
    body = MiniAgent.extract(raw, "tool")
    try:
        payload = json.loads(body)  # 解析 JSON
    except Exception:
        return "retry", MiniAgent.retry_notice("model returned malformed tool JSON")
```

**问题根源：** 模型尝试输出 `<tool>{"name":"write_file",...}</tool>` 这种 JSON 格式，但 `qwen3:4b` 生成的 JSON **语法有误**（比如缺少引号、逗号错误等），导致 `json.loads()` 失败。

**解决方案：**

1. **换用更大的模型** — `qwen3:4b` 太小，指令遵循能力不足。推荐尝试 `qwen3:9b` 如果你内存够的话

2. **或者调整 temperature** — 降低随机性可能有助于稳定输出：
   ```bash
   uv run mini-coding-agent --cwd ./tmp/binary-search-repo --model "qwen3:4b" --temperature 0.1
   ```

3. **检查 ollama 是否运行正常** — `ollama serve` 是否在后台运行？

你想试试降低 temperature 重新执行，还是考虑下载更大的模型？

找到了！**系统提示词**在 `build_prefix()` 方法里（[mini_coding_agent.py:337](mini_coding_agent.py#L337)）：

**核心提示词内容：**

```
You are Mini-Coding-Agent, a small local coding agent running through Ollama.

Rules:
- Use tools instead of guessing about the workspace.
- Return exactly one <tool>...</tool> or one <final>...</final>.
- Tool calls must look like:
  <tool>{"name":"tool_name","args":{...}}</tool>
- For write_file and patch_file with multi-line text, prefer XML style:
  <tool name="write_file" path="file.py"><content>...</content></tool>
- Final answers must look like:
  <final>your answer</final>
- Never invent tool results.
- ...
```

**问题分析：**

提示词里明确要求工具调用格式是：
```xml
<tool>{"name":"write_file","args":{"path":"file.py","content":"..."}}</tool>
```

但 `qwen3:4b` 模型生成的 JSON 可能有语法错误，导致 `json.loads()` 失败。

**你可以尝试的方向：**

content.thinking:
The user is asking whether for Qwen model, it's better to use English prompts or Chinese prompts. This is a reasonable question since:

1. Qwen is a Chinese-language model series (通义千问) from Alibaba/DAMO Academy
2. It was trained on a lot of Chinese data
3. But the prompt in the code is in English

For a Chinese-native model like Qwen, Chinese prompts would likely be better for:
- More natural understanding of instructions
- Better following of complex instructions
- Less confusion with formatting

But there's a tradeoff - the tool names and JSON format are in English anyway, so mixing might cause issues.

Let me give a balanced answer.

content.text:
对于 **Qwen 模型**，**中文 prompt 更好**。

**原因：**

1. **Qwen（通义千问）是阿里云的中文模型**，中文理解能力更强
2. 英文提示词需要模型做"翻译"，增加了出错概率
3. 模型对中文指令的遵循度更高

**但有个问题：**

提示词里的工具名（如 `write_file`、`read_file`）和 JSON 格式都是英文的，中英混合可能导致格式混乱。

**建议方案：**

把系统提示词翻译成中文，但保留工具名和 JSON 格式不变。这样模型既能准确理解规则，又能正确输出格式。

def build_prefix(self):
        tool_lines = []
        for name, tool in self.tools.items():
            fields = ", ".join(f"{key}: {value}" for key, value in tool["schema"].items())
            risk = "approval required" if tool["risky"] else "safe"
            tool_lines.append(f"- {name}({fields}) [{risk}] {tool['description']}")
        tool_text = "\n".join(tool_lines)
        examples = "\n".join(
            [
                '<tool>{"name":"list_files","args":{"path":"."}}</tool>',
                '<tool>{"name":"read_file","args":{"path":"README.md","start":1,"end":80}}</tool>',
                '<tool name="write_file" path="binary_search.py"><content>def binary_search(nums, target):\n    return -1\n</content></tool>',
                '<tool name="patch_file" path="binary_search.py"><old_text>return -1</old_text><new_text>return mid</new_text></tool>',
                '<tool>{"name":"run_shell","args":{"command":"uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q","timeout":20}}</tool>',
                "<final>Done.</final>",
            ]
        )
        return textwrap.dedent(
            f"""\
            You are Mini-Coding-Agent, a small local coding agent running through Ollama.

            Rules:
            - Use tools instead of guessing about the workspace.
            - Return exactly one <tool>...</tool> or one <final>...</final>.
            - Tool calls must look like:
              <tool>{{"name":"tool_name","args":{{...}}}}</tool>
            - For write_file and patch_file with multi-line text, prefer XML style:
              <tool name="write_file" path="file.py"><content>...</content></tool>
            - Final answers must look like:
              <final>your answer</final>
            - Never invent tool results.
            - Keep answers concise and concrete.
            - If the user asks you to create or update a specific file and the path is clear, use write_file or patch_file instead of repeatedly listing files.
            - Before writing tests for existing code, read the implementation first.
            - When writing tests, match the current implementation unless the user explicitly asked you to change the code.
            - New files should be complete and runnable, including obvious imports.
            - Do not repeat the same tool call with the same arguments if it did not help. Choose a different tool or return a final answer.
            - Required tool arguments must not be empty. Do not call read_file, write_file, patch_file, run_shell, or delegate with args={{}}.

            Tools:
            {tool_text}

            Valid response examples:
            {examples}

            {self.workspace.text()}
            """
        ).strip()

    def memory_text(self):

import argparse
import json
import os
import re
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
import textwrap
import urllib.error
import urllib.request
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path


DOC_NAMES = ("AGENTS.md", "README.md", "pyproject.toml", "package.json")
HELP_TEXT = "/help, /memory, /session, /reset, /exit"
WELCOME_ART = (
    "/\\     /\\\\",
    "{  `---'  }",
    "{  O   O  }",
    "~~>  V  <~~",
    "\\\\  \\|/  /",
    "`-----'__",
)
HELP_DETAILS = textwrap.dedent(
    """\
    Commands:
    /help    Show this help message.
    /memory  Show the agent's distilled working memory.
    /session Show the path to the saved session file.
    /reset   Clear the current session history and memory.
    /exit    Exit the agent.
    """
).strip()
MAX_TOOL_OUTPUT = 4000
MAX_HISTORY = 12000
IGNORED_PATH_NAMES = {".git", ".mini-coding-agent", "__pycache__", ".pytest_cache", ".ruff_cache", ".venv", "venv"}

##############################
#### Six Agent Components ####
##############################
# 1) Live Repo Context -> WorkspaceContext
# 2) Prompt Shape And Cache Reuse -> build_prefix, memory_text, prompt
# 3) Structured Tools, Validation, And Permissions -> build_tools, run_tool, validate_tool, approve, parse, path, tool_*
# 4) Context Reduction And Output Management -> clip, history_text
# 5) Transcripts, Memory, And Resumption -> SessionStore, record, note_tool, ask, reset
# 6) Delegation And Bounded Subagents -> tool_delegate

根据我的了解：

**Gemma 3** 是 Google 开源的轻量级模型系列（2B、7B 等参数规模），采用 Transformer 架构，可商用。

**Gemma 4** 截至我 knowledge cutoff（2025年6月）还没有发布。如果你听说"今天新出"，可能是最近的消息，我没有具体信息。

建议你直接查看：
- [Google Gemma 官网](https://ai.google.dev/gemma)
- [Hugging Face Gemma](https://huggingface.co/google)

如果 Gemma 4 确实发布了，Google 的 Gemma 系列通常都是开源的（Apache 2.0 许可证），可商用。

content.thinking:
The user manually deleted the Docker images and is asking where these images are stored. Docker images are stored in Docker's storage location, which is typically in /var/lib/docker on Linux, but on macOS with Docker Desktop, it's stored in a virtual machine's disk image.

On macOS, Docker Desktop stores everything in:
~/Library/Containers/com.docker.docker/Data/vms/0/

The actual disk image is usually:
~/Library/Containers/com.docker.docker/Data/vms/0/data/full.raw

Or similar.

content.text:
在 macOS 上，Docker 的镜像存在 **Docker Desktop 的虚拟机里**：

```
~/Library/Containers/com.docker.docker/Data/vms/0/
```

具体文件是虚拟磁盘镜像（`.raw` 或 `.qcow2` 格式），而不是本地文件系统的普通目录。

删除镜像后：
- 磁盘空间会释放
- 如果想彻底清理，可以右键 Docker Desktop 图标 → **"Preferences"** → **"Resources"** → **"Clean / Purge data"**

大小是 **245 GB**（这是虚拟磁盘镜像，实际占用空间会小一些，取决于分配的数据）。

Docker Desktop 的镜像和容器数据都在这个虚拟机里，不是在本地文件系统的普通目录。

**清理建议：**
- 用 `docker system prune -a` 清理未使用的镜像和容器（你手动删的应该已经释放了）

**Gemma 4 在 Ollama 上是可用的**，但你的 Ollama 版本 **0.15.4 太旧了**。

> "The model you are attempting to pull requires a newer version of Ollama."

**需要先更新 Ollama**：

```bash
brew upgrade ollama
```

你有多少内存？更新后我帮你选个合适的 Gemma 4 模型。

import argparse
import json
import os
import re
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
import textwrap
import urllib.error
import urllib.request
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path


DOC_NAMES = ("AGENTS.md", "README.md", "pyproject.toml", "package.json")
HELP_TEXT = "/help, /memory, /session, /reset, /exit"
WELCOME_ART = (
    "    /\\____/\\",
    "   /  o  o  \\",
    "  ( ==  ^  == )",
    "   )         (",
    "  (           )",
    " ( (  )   (  ) )",
    "(__(__)___(__)__)",
)
HELP_DETAILS = textwrap.dedent(
    """\
    Commands:
    /help    Show this help message.
    /memory  Show the agent's distilled working memory.
    /session Show the path to the saved session file.
    /reset   Clear the current session history and memory.
    /exit    Exit the agent.
    """
).strip()
MAX_TOOL_OUTPUT = 4000
MAX_HISTORY = 12000
IGNORED_PATH_NAMES = {".git", ".mini-coding-agent", "__pycache__", ".pytest_cache", ".ruff_cache", ".venv", "venv"}

##############################
#### Six Agent Components ####
##############################
# 1) Live Repo Context -> WorkspaceContext
# 2) Prompt Shape And Cache Reuse -> build_prefix, memory_text, prompt
# 3) Structured Tools, Validation, And Permissions -> build_tools, run_tool, validate_tool, approve, parse, path, tool_*
# 4) Context Reduction And Output Management -> clip, history_text
# 5) Transcripts, Memory, And Resumption -> SessionStore, record, note_tool, ask, reset
# 6) Delegation And Bounded Subagents -> tool_delegate


def now():
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()


# Supporting helper for component 4 (context reduction and output management).
def clip(text, limit=MAX_TOOL_OUTPUT):
    text = str(text)
    if len(text) <= limit:
        return text
    return text[:limit] + f"\n...[truncated {len(text) - limit} chars]"


def middle(text, limit):
    text = str(text).replace("\n", " ")
    if len(text) <= limit:
        return text
    if limit <= 3:
        return text[:limit]
    left = (limit - 3) // 2
    right = limit - 3 - left
    return text[:left] + "..." + text[-right:]


##############################
#### 1) Live Repo Context ####
##############################
class WorkspaceContext:
    def __init__(self, cwd, repo_root, branch, default_branch, status, recent_commits, project_docs):
        self.cwd = cwd
        self.repo_root = repo_root
        self.branch = branch
        self.default_branch = default_branch
        self.status = status
        self.recent_commits = recent_commits
        self.project_docs = project_docs

    @classmethod
    def build(cls, cwd):
        cwd = Path(cwd).resolve()

        def git(args, fallback=""):
            try:
                result = subprocess.run(
                    ["git", *args],
                    cwd=cwd,
                    capture_output=True,
                    text=True,
                    check=True,
                    timeout=5,

content.text:
好的，让我来带你学习这个项目。

---

## 项目概览

**mini-coding-agent** 是一个极简的本地编程智能体，通过 Ollama 调用本地模型。

---

## 文件结构

```
mini-coding-agent/
├── mini_coding_agent.py    # 核心代码（整个项目就这一个Python文件）
├── pyproject.toml           # 项目配置
├── README.md                # 英文文档（你已翻译成中文）
├── EXAMPLE.md               # 使用示例
├── tests/                   # 测试目录
├── cspell.json              # 拼写检查配置
└── tmp/                     # 临时测试目录
```

---

## 六大核心组件

代码注释已经帮我们划分好了（[mini_coding_agent.py:41-49](mini_coding_agent.py#L41-L49)）：

| 组件 | 负责内容 | 类/函数 |
|------|----------|---------|
| 1 | **工作区上下文** | `WorkspaceContext` |
| 2 | **提示词构建** | `build_prefix`, `memory_text`, `prompt` |
| 3 | **工具定义与执行** | `build_tools`, `run_tool`, `validate_tool`, `approve`, `parse` |
| 4 | **上下文缩减** | `clip`, `history_text` |
| 5 | **会话记录与恢复** | `SessionStore`, `record`, `note_tool`, `ask`, `reset` |
| 6 | **子智能体委托** | `tool_delegate` |

---

你想先深入哪个部分？我可以详细讲解：
1. **WorkspaceContext** — 如何感知当前项目状态
2. **提示词系统** — 如何让模型理解任务
3. **工具系统** — 如何让模型执行实际操作
4. **执行循环** — 如何让模型反复思考和行动
一步一步来。直到讲完为止

好的，我们从第一个组件开始。

## 组件 1：工作区上下文 (WorkspaceContext)

**作用**：让智能体"看到"当前项目的情况。

content.content:
75	##############################
76	#### 1) Live Repo Context ####
77	##############################
78	class WorkspaceContext:
79	    def __init__(self, cwd, repo_root, branch, default_branch, status, recent_commits, project_docs):
80	        self.cwd = cwd
81	        self.repo_root = repo_root
82	        self.branch = branch
83	        self.default_branch = default_branch
84	        self.status = status
85	        self.recent_commits = recent_commits
86	        self.project_docs = project_docs
87	
88	    @classmethod
89	    def build(cls, cwd):
90	        cwd = Path(cwd).resolve()
91	
92	        def git(args, fallback=""):
93	            try:
94	                result = subprocess.run(
95	                    ["git", *args],
96	                    cwd=cwd,
97	                    capture_output=True,
98	                    text=True,
99	                    check=True,
100	                    timeout=5,
101	                )
102	                return result.stdout.strip() or fallback
103	            except Exception:
104	                return fallback
105	
106	        repo_root = Path(git(["rev-parse", "--show-toplevel"], str(cwd))).resolve()
107	        docs = {}
108	        for base in (repo_root, cwd):
109	            for name in DOC_NAMES:
110	                path = base / name
111	                if not path.exists():
112	                    continue
113	                key = str(path.relative_to(repo_root))
114	                if key in docs:
115	                    continue
116	                docs[key] = clip(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"), 1200)
117	
118	        return cls(
119	            cwd=str(cwd),
120	            repo_root=str(repo_root),
121	            branch=git(["branch", "--show-current"], "-") or "-",
122	            default_branch=(git(["symbolic-ref", "--short", "refs/remotes/origin/HEAD"], "origin/main") or "origin/main").removeprefix("origin/"),
123	            status=clip(git(["status", "--short"], "clean") or "clean", 1500),
124	            recent_commits=[line for line in git(["log", "--oneline", "-5"]).splitlines() if line],
125	            project_docs=docs,
126	        )
127	
128	    def text(self):
129	        commits = "\n".join(f"- {line}" for line in self.recent_commits) or "- none"
130	        docs = "\n".join(f"- {path}\n{snippet}" for path, snippet in self.project_docs.items()) or "- none"
131	        return textwrap.dedent(
132	            f"""\
133	            Workspace:

content.text:
### 核心代码解析

```python
class WorkspaceContext:
```

**`WorkspaceContext.build(cwd)` 方法**（第 88-126 行）：

这个方法通过执行 Git 命令来收集项目信息：

| Git 命令 | 获取内容 | fallback |
|----------|----------|----------|
| `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` | 仓库根目录 | 当前目录 |
| `git branch --show-current` | 当前分支名 | `-` |
| `git symbolic-ref ... refs/remotes/origin/HEAD` | 默认分支 | `origin/main` |
| `git status --short` | 工作区状态 | `clean` |
| `git log --oneline -5` | 最近5条提交 | 空 |

**同时读取项目文档**（第 107-116 行）：
```python
DOC_NAMES = ("AGENTS.md", "README.md", "pyproject.toml", "package.json")
```
会自动读取这些文件的内容（限制1200字符），让模型能了解项目。

### `text()` 方法（第 128-145 行）

把所有信息格式化成文本，返回给模型：

```
Workspace:
- cwd: /path/to/current/dir
- repo_root: /path/to/repo/root
- branch: main
- default_branch: main
- status:
 M modified_file.py
?? new_file.py
- recent_commits:
- abc1234 添加新功能
- def5678 修复bug
- project_docs:
- README.md
This is a project...
```

---

**组件 1 小结**：WorkspaceContext 让智能体知道自己在哪个项目、在哪个分支、有什么变更、近期做了什么修改。

---

## 组件 5：会话存储 (SessionStore)

在继续组件 2 之前，需要先理解会话存储，因为组件 2 的提示词依赖它。

content.text:
### SessionStore 类（第 151-169 行）

**作用**：保存和恢复对话会话。

```python
class SessionStore:
    def __init__(self, root):
        self.root = Path(root)
        self.root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
```

会话存储在 `.mini-coding-agent/sessions/` 目录，每个会话一个 JSON 文件。

| 方法 | 作用 |
|------|------|
| `path(session_id)` | 生成会话文件路径 |
| `save(session)` | 保存会话到 JSON 文件 |
| `load(session_id)` | 从文件加载会话 |
| `latest()` | 获取最新会话的 ID |

### OllamaModelClient 类（第 184-227 行）

**作用**：封装与 Ollama API 的通信。

```python
class OllamaModelClient:
    def complete(self, prompt, max_new_tokens):
        payload = {
            "model": self.model,
            "prompt": prompt,
            "options": {
                "num_predict": max_new_tokens,  # 最大输出token
                "temperature": self.temperature,  # 随机性
                "top_p": self.top_p,  # 核采样
            },
        }
        # 发送 POST 请求到 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate
```

这就是为什么必须先运行 `ollama serve`，否则连接会失败。

---

**组件 5（部分）小结**：SessionStore 负责持久化，OllamaModelClient 负责与本地模型通信。

---

content.text:
### 组件 3：工具定义 (build_tools)

**作用**：定义智能体能使用的所有工具。

```python
tools = {
    "list_files": {
        "schema": {"path": "str='.'"},      # 参数：path，默认值 '.'
        "risky": False,                      # 是否危险（是否需要审批）
        "description": "列出文件",
        "run": self.tool_list_files,          # 实际执行的函数
    },
    "read_file": {...},      # 读取文件
    "search": {...},         # 搜索文件内容
    "run_shell": {...},      # 执行shell命令（危险！）
    "write_file": {...},     # 写入文件（危险！）
    "patch_file": {...},     # 替换文件内容（危险！）
    "delegate": {...},       # 委托子任务
}
```

**危险工具需要审批**：
- `write_file`、`patch_file`、`run_shell` 标记为 `risky: True`
- 执行前会提示用户确认

### 组件 2：提示词前缀 (build_prefix)

```python
def build_prefix(self):
    # 1. 把工具列表格式化成文本
    tool_text = "\n".join([
        "- list_files(path: str='.') [safe] 列出文件",
        "- write_file(path: str, content: str) [approval required] 写入文件",
        ...
    ])
    
    # 2. 工具调用示例
    examples = "\n".join([
        '<tool>{"name":"list_files","args":{"path":"."}}</tool>',
        '<tool name="write_file" path="file.py"><content>...</content></tool>',
        "<final>Done.</final>",
    ])
    
    return f"""\
    你是 Mini-Coding-Agent，一个通过 Ollama 运行的小型本地编程智能体。

    规则：
    - 使用工具而不是猜测工作区的情况。
    - 只返回一个 <tool>...</tool> 或一个 <final>...</final>。
    - ...

    工具：
    {tool_text}

    有效响应示例：
    {examples}

    {self.workspace.text()}
    """
```

---

## 继续：MiniAgent 主循环

content.text:
### 组件 4：上下文缩减 (history_text)

**作用**：管理对话历史，防止超出模型上下文限制。

```python
def history_text(self):
    lines = []
    recent_start = max(0, len(history) - 6)  # 只保留最近6条
    
    for index, item in enumerate(history):
        # 对于旧的 read_file 结果，去重（同一文件只保留一次）
        if item["role"] == "tool" and item["name"] == "read_file" and not recent:
            if path in seen_reads:
                continue
            seen_reads.add(path)
        
        # 旧内容限制180字符，新内容限制900字符
        limit = 900 if recent else 180
        lines.append(f"[{item['role']}] {clip(item['content'], limit)}")
    
    return clip("\n".join(lines), MAX_HISTORY)  # 总长度限制12000字符
```

### 完整提示词结构 (prompt 方法)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ {self.prefix}                              │  ← build_prefix() 结果
│   - 系统规则                                │
│   - 工具列表                                │
│   - 使用示例                                │
│   - 工作区信息                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ {self.memory_text()}                        │  ← 记忆（任务、文件、笔记）
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Transcript:                                 │  ← 对话历史
│   [user] 你好                               │
│   [assistant] 你好！有什么可以帮你的？       │
│   [tool:list_files] {"path": "."}          │
│   README.md                                 │
│   main.py                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Current user request:                       │  ← 当前任务
│   创建 binary_search.py                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

def ask(self, user_message):
        memory = self.session["memory"]
        if not memory["task"]:
            memory["task"] = clip(user_message.strip(), 300)
        self.record({"role": "user", "content": user_message, "created_at": now()})

        tool_steps = 0
        attempts = 0
        max_attempts = max(self.max_steps * 3, self.max_steps + 4)

        while tool_steps < self.max_steps and attempts < max_attempts:
            attempts += 1
            raw = self.model_client.complete(self.prompt(user_message), self.max_new_tokens)
            kind, payload = self.parse(raw)

            if kind == "tool":
                tool_steps += 1
                name = payload.get("name", "")
                args = payload.get("args", {})
                result = self.run_tool(name, args)
                self.record(
                    {
                        "role": "tool",
                        "name": name,
                        "args": args,
                        "content": result,
                        "created_at": now(),
                    }
                )
                self.note_tool(name, args, result)
                continue

            if kind == "retry":
                self.record({"role": "assistant", "content": payload, "created_at": now()})
                continue

            final = (payload or raw).strip()
            self.record({"role": "assistant", "content": final, "created_at": now()})
            self.remember(memory["notes"], clip(final, 220), 5)
            return final

        if attempts >= max_attempts and tool_steps < self.max_steps:
            final = "Stopped after too many malformed model responses without a valid tool call or final answer."
        else:
            final = "Stopped after reaching the step limit without a final answer."
        self.record({"role": "assistant", "content": final, "created_at": now()})
        return final

    #############################################################
    #### 3) Structured Tools, Validation, And Permissions #######
    #############################################################
    def run_tool(self, name, args):
        tool = self.tools.get(name)
        if tool is None:
            return f"error: unknown tool '{name}'"
        try:
            self.validate_tool(name, args)
        except Exception as exc:
            example = self.tool_example(name)
            message = f"error: invalid arguments for {name}: {exc}"

content.text:
### 执行循环解析 (ask 方法)

```python
def ask(self, user_message):
    tool_steps = 0          # 已执行的工具数量
    attempts = 0             # 尝试次数
    max_attempts = max(self.max_steps * 3, self.max_steps + 4)  # 最多重试次数
    
    while tool_steps < self.max_steps and attempts < max_attempts:
        attempts += 1
        
        # 1. 发送提示词给模型
        raw = self.model_client.complete(self.prompt(user_message), self.max_new_tokens)
        
        # 2. 解析模型响应
        kind, payload = self.parse(raw)
        
        if kind == "tool":          # 模型要求调用工具
            tool_steps += 1
            result = self.run_tool(name, args)
            self.record({...})       # 记录工具结果
            self.note_tool(...)      # 更新记忆
            continue                 # 继续下一轮
        
        if kind == "retry":          # 模型响应格式错误
            self.record({...})       # 记录错误
            continue                 # 重试
        
        if kind == "final":          # 模型返回最终答案
            return final             # 完成！
```

**循环执行流程**：

```
用户输入 → 构建提示词 → 模型思考 
                           ↓
                    返回 <tool> 或 <final>
                           ↓
              ┌────────────┴────────────┐
              ↓                         ↓
         <tool> 调用工具             <final> 返回结果
              ↓                         ↓
         记录结果到历史              返回给用户
         继续下一轮循环
```

---

## 组件 3：工具执行 (run_tool, parse)

content.text:
### parse 方法 — 解析模型响应

模型可以返回两种格式的工具调用：

**1. JSON 格式**（`<tool>{"name":...}</tool>`）：
```python
body = MiniAgent.extract(raw, "tool")  # 提取 <tool>...</tool> 内容
payload = json.loads(body)            # 解析 JSON
```

**2. XML 格式**（`<tool name="..." path="...">...</tool>`）：
```python
payload = MiniAgent.parse_xml_tool(raw)  # 正则解析 XML
```

**parse 返回三种类型**：

| 返回值 | 含义 | 后续处理 |
|--------|------|----------|
| `"tool", payload` | 模型要求调用工具 | 执行 `run_tool()` |
| `"final", text` | 模型返回最终答案 | 返回给用户 |
| `"retry", notice` | 响应格式错误 | 重新调用模型 |

### 工具实现解析

| 工具 | 函数 | 功能 |
|------|------|------|
| `list_files` | `tool_list_files` | 列出目录内容（跳过忽略列表） |
| `read_file` | `tool_read_file` | 读取文件（带行号） |
| `search` | `tool_search` | 搜索内容（优先用 ripgrep） |
| `run_shell` | `tool_run_shell` | 执行 shell 命令 |
| `write_file` | `tool_write_file` | 写入文件 |
| `patch_file` | `tool_patch_file` | 替换文件内容 |
| `delegate` | `tool_delegate` | 委托子任务 |

**示例输出**：

```python
# list_files 输出
[F] README.md
[F] main.py
[D] src
[D] tests

# read_file 输出
# main.py
   1: def hello():
   2:     print("world")

# search 输出
main.py:3:hello world
main.py:10:print(hello)

# run_shell 输出
exit_code: 0
stdout:
test passed!
stderr:
(empty)
```

content.text:
### 审批机制 (approve)

**作用**：对于危险操作（写入文件、执行命令），在执行前要求用户确认。

```python
def approve(self, name, args):
    if self.approval_policy == "auto":    # 自动审批
        return True
    if self.approval_policy == "never":    # 永远拒绝
        return False
    
    # ask 模式：询问用户
    answer = input(f"approve {name} {args}? [y/N] ")
    return answer.strip().lower() in {"y", "yes"}
```

**三种审批模式**：

| 模式 | 行为 |
|------|------|
| `--approval ask`（默认） | 每次危险操作前询问 |
| `--approval auto` | 自动允许所有操作 |
| `--approval never` | 拒绝所有危险操作 |

class MiniAgent:
    def __init__(
        self,
        model_client,
        workspace,
        session_store,
        session=None,
        approval_policy="ask",
        max_steps=6,
        max_new_tokens=512,
        depth=0,
        max_depth=1,
        read_only=False,
    ):
        self.model_client = model_client
        self.workspace = workspace
        self.root = Path(workspace.repo_root)
        self.session_store = session_store
        self.approval_policy = approval_policy
        self.max_steps = max_steps
        self.max_new_tokens = max_new_tokens
        self.depth = depth
        self.max_depth = max_depth
        self.read_only = read_only
        self.session = session or {
            "id": datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d-%H%M%S") + "-" + uuid.uuid4().hex[:6],
            "created_at": now(),
            "workspace_root": workspace.repo_root,
            "history": [],
            "memory": {"task": "", "files": [], "notes": []},
        }
        self.tools = self.build_tools()
        self.prefix = self.build_prefix()

            approval_policy=args.approval,
            max_steps=args.max_steps,
            max_new_tokens=args.max_new_tokens,
        )
    return MiniAgent(
        model_client=model,
        workspace=workspace,
        session_store=store,
        approval_policy=args.approval,
        max_steps=args.max_steps,
        max_new_tokens=args.max_new_tokens,
    )


def build_arg_parser():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        formatter_class=argparse.ArgumentDefaultsHelpFormatter,
        description="Minimal coding agent for Ollama models.",
    )
    parser.add_argument("prompt", nargs="*", help="Optional one-shot prompt.")
    parser.add_argument("--cwd", default=".", help="Workspace directory.")
    parser.add_argument("--model", default="qwen3.5:4b", help="Ollama model name.")
    parser.add_argument("--host", default="http://127.0.0.1:11434", help="Ollama server URL.")
    parser.add_argument("--ollama-timeout", type=int, default=300, help="Ollama request timeout in seconds.")
    parser.add_argument("--resume", default=None, help="Session id to resume or 'latest'.")
    parser.add_argument("--approval", choices=("ask", "auto", "never"), default="ask", help="Approval policy for risky tools.")
    parser.add_argument("--max-steps", type=int, default=6, help="Maximum tool/model iterations per request.")
    parser.add_argument("--max-new-tokens", type=int, default=512, help="Maximum model output tokens per step.")
    parser.add_argument("--temperature", type=float, default=0.2, help="Sampling temperature sent to Ollama.")
    parser.add_argument("--top-p", type=float, default=0.9, help="Top-p sampling value sent to Ollama.")
    return parser


def main(argv=None):
    args = build_arg_parser().parse_args(argv)
    agent = build_agent(args)

    print(build_welcome(agent, model=args.model, host=args.host))

    if args.prompt:
        prompt = " ".join(args.prompt).strip()
        if prompt:
            print()
            try:
                print(agent.ask(prompt))
            except RuntimeError as exc:
                print(str(exc), file=sys.stderr)
                return 1
        return 0

    while True:
        try:
            user_input = input("\nmini-coding-agent> ").strip()
        except (EOFError, KeyboardInterrupt):
            print("")
            return 0

        if not user_input:
            continue
        if user_input in {"/exit", "/quit"}:
            return 0
        if user_input == "/help":
            print(HELP_DETAILS)
            continue
        if user_input == "/memory":
            print(agent.memory_text())
            continue
        if user_input == "/session":
            print(agent.session_path)
            continue
        if user_input == "/reset":
            agent.reset()
            print("session reset")
            continue

        print()
        try:
            print(agent.ask(user_input))
        except RuntimeError as exc:
            print(str(exc), file=sys.stderr)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

content.text:
### 主入口解析 (main 函数)

```python
def main():
    # 1. 解析命令行参数
    args = build_arg_parser().parse_args()
    
    # 2. 创建 Agent
    agent = build_agent(args)
    
    # 3. 打印欢迎界面
    print(build_welcome(...))
    
    # 4. 两种模式
    if args.prompt:
        # 单次模式：执行一个命令就退出
        print(agent.ask(prompt))
    else:
        # REPL 模式：循环读取用户输入
        while True:
            user_input = input("\nmini-coding-agent> ")
            
            # 处理内置命令
            if user_input == "/help": print(HELP_DETAILS)
            if user_input == "/memory": print(agent.memory_text())
            if user_input == "/session": print(agent.session_path)
            if user_input == "/reset": agent.reset(); print("session reset")
            if user_input in {"/exit", "/quit"}: return
            
            # 执行用户任务
            print(agent.ask(user_input))
```

### CLI 参数汇总

| 参数 | 默认值 | 说明 |
|------|--------|------|
| `--cwd` | `.` | 工作目录 |
| `--model` | `qwen3.5:4b` | 模型名称 |
| `--host` | `http://127.0.0.1:11434` | Ollama 地址 |
| `--approval` | `ask` | 审批模式 |
| `--max-steps` | `6` | 最大工具调用次数 |
| `--max-new-tokens` | `512` | 最大输出 token |
| `--resume` | `None` | 恢复的会话 ID |
| `--temperature` | `0.2` | 随机性 |
| `--top-p` | `0.9` | 核采样 |

## 完整流程总结

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        main()                                │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ 1. build_arg_parser()        解析命令行参数                  │
│ 2. build_agent()             创建 MiniAgent                 │
│    ├── WorkspaceContext.build()  获取工作区信息               │
│    ├── SessionStore           初始化会话存储                  │
│    └── OllamaModelClient     连接 Ollama                    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ 3. REPL 循环或单次执行                                       │
│    └── ask(user_message)                                    │
│        ├── prompt() 构建完整提示词                           │
│        │   ├── build_prefix()   系统规则+工具+示例           │
│        │   ├── memory_text()    记忆                         │
│        │   └── history_text()   对话历史                     │
│        ├── model.complete()     调用 Ollama                  │
│        ├── parse()              解析响应                      │
│        └── ┌────────────────────────────────────┐           │
│            │  kind == "tool"?                    │           │
│            ├─→ run_tool() → approve() → 执行工具 │           │
│            │  → record() → 记录结果               │           │
│            │  → 继续下一轮循环                    │           │
│            ├─→ kind == "retry"?                  │           │
│            │  → 记录错误 → 继续下一轮循环        │           │
│            └─→ kind == "final"?                  │           │
│               → 返回结果给用户                  │           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## 简历写法示例

---

### 项目名称
**Mini-Coding-Agent | 本地化 AI 编程智能体**

### 项目描述
一个极简的本地 AI 编程智能体，通过 Ollama 调用本地大语言模型，支持工具调用、对话记忆、会话恢复等功能。核心代码仅约 1000 行，专注于可读性和轻量化。

### 技术栈
- Python 3.10+ / 标准库（无外部依赖）
- Ollama API（本地模型推理）
- Git（工作区感知）

### 核心功能
- **六大组件架构**：工作区上下文、提示词构建、工具系统、上下文缩减、会话存储、子任务委托
- **结构化工具调用**：支持 list_files、read_file、search、write_file、patch_file、run_shell、delegate
- **危险操作审批机制**：ask / auto / never 三种模式
- **对话记忆与恢复**：支持会话持久化和断点恢复
- **上下文管理**：智能裁剪历史、限制输出长度

### 未来计划（可写进简历）
- **多模型支持**：支持 Claude API、OpenAI API 作为备选后端
- **RAG 增强**：集成向量数据库，实现代码语义检索
- **Web Search**：接入搜索引擎，扩大智能体的知识边界
- **并行工具调用**：支持同一轮次内并发执行独立任务
- **测试自动化**：自动生成测试用例并执行验证
- **Windows/macOS/Linux 跨平台**：统一 CLI 入口，兼容各平台特性

### 项目亮点
- 零外部依赖，仅用 Python 标准库实现完整 Agent 逻辑
- 轻量化设计，核心逻辑可快速理解和二次开发
- 支持中文提示词，优化本地中文模型表现
